headline: 3 Dividend Stocks to Hold for the Next 10 Years
summary: All of them could be "forever" holdings, but the coming decade could prove surprisingly fruitful for each of these outfits.

raw.headline: 3 Dividend Stocks to Hold for the Next 10 Years
raw.summary: All of them could be "forever" holdings, but the coming decade could prove surprisingly fruitful for each of these outfits.

headline: MRK Stock Gains After CHMP Backs Keytruda Combo for Bladder Cancer
summary: Merck jumps after CHMP backs Keytruda plus Padcev for certain bladder cancer patients, a combo with the potential to expand treatment options.

raw.headline: MRK Stock Gains After CHMP Backs Keytruda Combo for Bladder Cancer
raw.summary: Merck jumps after CHMP backs Keytruda plus Padcev for certain bladder cancer patients, a combo with the potential to expand treatment options.

headline: GILD Scores FDA Win for HDV Drug, CHMP Backs Trodelvy
summary: Gilead wins FDA approval for Hepcludex, the first U.S. therapy for chronic HDV, while Trodelvy advances in Europe for TNBC.

raw.headline: GILD Scores FDA Win for HDV Drug, CHMP Backs Trodelvy
raw.summary: Gilead wins FDA approval for Hepcludex, the first U.S. therapy for chronic HDV, while Trodelvy advances in Europe for TNBC.
